summary: Iteration 2 e2e testing of Shutter Shots by KP (album-based rebrand). Backend: 19 pytest cases (albums/testimonials/auth/CRUD/settings) — 100% pass. Frontend: Home rebrand, album grids for wedding/pre-wedding/cinematic, album detail (Aarav & Meera) with 4 images + lightbox, cinematic video album with lightbox-video, contact page reflecting settings, admin login + section switching + testimonial CRUD via UI + settings page — all working with no console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: AlbumPage renders `data-testid=album-img-{i}` only after data fetch completes; first paint shows loading state (correct behavior, just noting for testing agents to wait for the selector).
Contact page reflects live /api/settings values (backend PUT updates DB reliably) — verified end-to-end.
Lightbox video player renders inline (not styled full-screen) but functionally works — data-testid='lightbox-video' present and clickable.
One 403 CONSOLE error observed on /cinematic (likely a preload/prefetch of a resource); non-blocking, no functional impact.
seed_data_creation: None; auto-seeded on startup by seed_if_empty(). All UI-created test data (TEST_* prefixed) was cleaned up after tests.
verified_backend_endpoints: POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/albums -> auto-slug on create + rename; media unlinked (album_id=None) on delete instead of deleted
verified_frontend_flows: Home: hero-video, brand 'Shutter Shots' in nav+footer, 4 stat blocks (120+/38/6/5.0), marquee, category cards showing correct album counts (3/2/2), 4 testimonial cards in testimonials-section, closing-cta, custom SVG Logo (nav-logo has SVG child, not old text).
/wedding: 3 album cards (aarav-meera, rohan-priya, kabir-ananya). Clicking navigates to /wedding/aarav-meera.
/wedding/aarav-meera: header shows name + description + location + date, 4 album-img-{1..4} present, clicking opens lightbox with image, back-to-folder returns to /wedding.
/cinematic: 2 album cards with play badge overlay, clicking navigates to /cinematic/aarav-meera-film, video card opens lightbox-video.
/contact: contact-phone/whatsapp/email/instagram with correct href reflecting /api/settings values.

/admin: three section cards (albums/media/testimonials), category tabs (wedding/pre-wedding/cinematic), add-album-btn opens admin-modal, create+delete album works, section-media shows modal-album selector, testimonial CRUD via UI (create+delete) works.
/admin/settings: all fields (hero_video_url, hero_headline_1/2, phone, whatsapp, email, instagram, location) render; save + revert buttons present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints and admin/public UI flows are working as specified for the album-based rebrand ('Shutter Shots by KP'). Reuse /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py for regression. Admin creds: karan / karan@2026. Slugify uses lower + non-alphanumeric -> '-'. Cinematic slug 'aarav-meera-film' verified. Testimonials seeded 4 items; contact page shows live settings from /api/settings.
